normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 1.1 - Planning Processes and Decision Making
scope_summary: Procedural local planning policy made under Schedule 2 of the LPS Regulations 2015 and City of Melville LPS6, applying to all development on land where LPS6 applies. It sets out lodgement, assessment, advertising/consultation and determination processes for development applications, MRS applications, local planning policies, scheme amendments, PAW closures and restrictive covenants, including when residential R-Codes performance assessments trigger neighbour consultation. The policy expressly states it contains no development standards; where it conflicts with the Regulations, the Regulations prevail.

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
Planning and Development (Development Assessment Panels) Regulations 2011

quality_flags: extraction quality good; advertising-extent table (clause 3.1) partially flattened but values recoverable
summary.json cross-reference 'Local Planning Policy 6.1' is a misparse of internal clause 6.1, not a cited instrument
version evidenced by 'Last Review Date: 20 May 2025' header and Administrative Review 20 May 2025 (Council Resolution UP25/69); printed version stamp 6/06/2025
